---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to routing, the CLI, or the template
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches routing, describe the signal you'd match
on (header, work-type, tag) and which model/alias it should land on.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.
